# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dev-team-nsg",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the NSG"
      }
    },
    "allowedSourceIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed source IP ranges for management access"
      }
    },
    "enableRdpAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable RDP access (port 3389)"
      }
    },
    "enableSshAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable SSH access (port 22)"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "rdpRuleName": "Allow-RDP-Restricted",
    "sshRuleName": "Allow-SSH-Restricted",
    "httpRuleName": "Allow-HTTP",
    "httpsRuleName": "Allow-HTTPS"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('httpsRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS traffic",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('httpRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP traffic",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('sshRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH from specific IP ranges only",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSourceIpRanges')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "[if(parameters('enableSshAccess'), 'Allow', 'Deny')]",
              "priority": 200,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('rdpRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP from specific IP ranges only",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSourceIpRanges')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "[if(parameters('enableRdpAccess'), 'Allow', 'Deny')]",
              "priority": 210,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Deny all other inbound traffic",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    }
  }
}
